description_long: This is a modern workstation setup featuring a large rectangular desk with a smooth, dark surface supported by four slender metal legs. On top of the desk are three flat-panel computer monitors arranged side by side, each displaying different digital content. A pair of over-ear headphones rests on the desk, suggesting use for audio or communication tasks. An ergonomic black office chair with a high back and five caster wheels is positioned in front of the monitors, indicating a workspace designed for extended use. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible drawers or storage compartments. The materials and arrangement suggest a professional environment focused on digital or surveillance work.
description: A large, modern desk setup with three monitors, headphones, and an ergonomic office chair, designed for digital work. The desk is minimalistic, with a smooth dark surface and metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three monitors, headphones, and the office chair facing the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the alignment of the monitors, and the chair's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three monitors and the chair tucked under the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitors' thin profiles and the chair slightly turned away.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the office chair and monitors, intended for seated interaction with the screens and equipment. The back is plain, with the monitors' rear panels visible.
attribute_usage_context: multi-monitor computer workstation for surveillance, monitoring, or digital work
